gap_analysis.recommended_positioning:
Objective: Position the Pigeon Air Fryer as the go-to affordable and healthy cooking solution for budget-conscious Indian home cooks. | Targeting: {'demographics': '25-45 years, middle-income households, urban and semi-urban areas in India.', 'interests': ['healthy cooking', 'budget-friendly kitchen appliances', 'smart home gadgets']} | Messaging: {'USP': 'Healthy cooking made affordable with the Pigeon Air Fryer – priced perfectly for Indian households.', 'emotional hook': 'Make every meal guilt-free and delicious, without breaking the bank.'} | Platforms: ['Facebook Ads', 'Instagram Ads', 'YouTube Pre-Roll Ads', 'Google Display Network'] | Execution: {'ad types': ['Carousel Ads showing recipes made with the air fryer', 'Video Ads comparing the air fryer to traditional cooking methods', 'Static Image Ads highlighting the price and benefits'], 'budget': 'Allocate 70% to digital ads, 20% to influencer collaborations, and 10% to offline promotions.'}

campaign.campaign_strategy:
Objective: Position the Pigeon Air Fryer as the go-to affordable and healthy cooking solution for budget-conscious Indian home cooks. | Targeting: {'demographics': '25-45 years, middle-income households, urban and semi-urban areas in India.', 'interests': ['healthy cooking', 'budget-friendly kitchen appliances', 'smart home gadgets']} | Messaging: {'USP': 'Healthy cooking made affordable with the Pigeon Air Fryer – priced perfectly for Indian households.', 'emotional hook': 'Make every meal guilt-free and delicious, without breaking the bank.'} | Platforms: ['Facebook Ads', 'Instagram Ads', 'YouTube Pre-Roll Ads', 'Google Display Network'] | Execution: {'ad types': ['Carousel Ads showing recipes made with the air fryer', 'Video Ads comparing the air fryer to traditional cooking methods', 'Static Image Ads highlighting the price and benefits'], 'budget': 'Allocate 70% to digital ads, 20% to influencer collaborations, and 10% to offline promotions.'}

Identity context: Product image attached (61GlLfqLt0L._SL1500_1200x.webp).
